factors.rationale: The product is visible but competes with other elements in the image.
The setting hints at lifestyle but does not clearly show the accessory in use.
The image communicates a broad positive claim about delivery but lacks a specific benefit.
The layout is clear, with readable text and minimal distractions.
The product is clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
The brand name and delivery offer provide a credible trust signal.
Strong contrast and legible text make the creative readable.
The image has clear campaign intent with promotional messaging.
